text:
Created attachment 184718
luakit 2017 port update diff

www/luakit has seen the last update in 2012. I would like to update this port to the latest version as well as take over the maintenance.

I'm working on the port here: https://github.com/xkpd3/luakit-port

The attached diff also contains an update for UPDATING.
